description: 为 codegen agent 提供受控站点探查能力，在生成 adapter 前判断入口 URL 应走 static HTML、JSON API，还是需要未来 render-pool。

tasks.title: [infra/source-probe] 提供受控 fetch/json/render-required 探查能力
tasks.notes: 已实现 infra/source_probe 与 scripts/probe_source.py，并更新 codegen/crawl-engine/render-pool 相关 spec。验证：uv run pytest tests/infra/test_source_probe.py -q -> 4 passed；uv run ruff check infra/source_probe scripts/probe_source.py tests/infra/test_source_probe.py -> passed；uv run python -m py_compile scripts/probe_source.py infra/source_probe/probe.py -> passed；uv run python scripts/probe_source.py --help -> passed；www.gov.cn live probe -> json_api；flk.npc.gov.cn live probe -> headless_required；uv run pytest tests/ -q -> 89 passed；git diff --check -> passed。PR：https://github.com/dlange666/xiniu-crawler-planning/pull/9。
